hooks.command: { if ls .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* &>/dev/null; then INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$SID" ] && echo final > ".brains_in_a_hat/state/retro-pending.${SID}"; cp .brains_in_a_hat/state/session-state.json .brains_in_a_hat/state/session-end-snapshot.json 2>/dev/null || true; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionEnd","additionalContext":"Session ending. Spawn ALL THREE in parallel, fire-and-exit (do NOT wait): (1) SendMessage(to=Gale) to finalize session chapter and compile PDF. (2) Agent(subagent_type=\"brains-in-a-hat:meta-retro\", name=\"Mira\", model=\"sonnet\", run_in_background=true, prompt=\"mode=final. Read session-state.json, activity.jsonl, and the session-log in vault. Write the session retro with CODEOWNERS/patterns/workflow maintenance. Report a one-line receipt.\"). (3) Agent(subagent_type=\"brains-in-a-hat:session-manager\", name=\"Reed\", model=\"sonnet\", run_in_background=true, prompt=\"mode=persist. Promote session-state.json.decisions to vault as decisions/<slug>.md. Update user-preferences.json. Do NOT write a retro \u2014 that is Mira\u2019s job. Report a one-line receipt.\"). Exit after firing all three."}}'; fi; } 2>> .brains_in_a_hat/state/hook-debug.log || true

{ INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty' 2>/dev/null); mkdir -p .brains_in_a_hat/state; if [ -n "$SID" ]; then touch ".brains_in_a_hat/state/compact-pending.${SID}"; echo checkpoint > ".brains_in_a_hat/state/retro-pending.${SID}"; fi; } 2>> .brains_in_a_hat/state/hook-debug.log || true

{ if ls .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* &>/dev/null; then INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.agent_type // "agent"'); SESSION=$(ls -t .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* 2>/dev/null | head -1); SESSION="${SESSION##*/active.}"; jq -nc --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg agent "$AGENT" --arg session "$SESSION" '{ts:$ts,agent:$agent,session:$session,event:"start",detail:"spawned"}' >> .brains_in_a_hat/state/activity.jsonl 2>/dev/null; fi; } 2>> .brains_in_a_hat/state/hook-debug.log || true

{ INPUT=$(cat); ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.agent_id // .agent_type // empty' 2>/dev/null); mkdir -p .brains_in_a_hat/state; [ -n "$ID" ] && touch ".brains_in_a_hat/state/in-subagent.${ID}"; } 2>> .brains_in_a_hat/state/hook-debug.log || true

{ if ls .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* &>/dev/null; then INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.agent_type // "agent"'); SESSION=$(ls -t .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* 2>/dev/null | head -1); SESSION="${SESSION##*/active.}"; jq -nc --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg agent "$AGENT" --arg session "$SESSION" '{ts:$ts,agent:$agent,session:$session,event:"done",detail:"completed"}' >> .brains_in_a_hat/state/activity.jsonl 2>/dev/null; fi; } 2>> .brains_in_a_hat/state/hook-debug.log || true

{ INPUT=$(cat); ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.agent_id // .agent_type // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$ID" ] && rm -f ".brains_in_a_hat/state/in-subagent.${ID}"; } 2>> .brains_in_a_hat/state/hook-debug.log || true

{ if ls .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* &>/dev/null; then mkdir -p .brains_in_a_hat/state; INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.name // .tool_input.subagent_type // "agent"'); DESC=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.description // ""'); SESSION=$(ls -t .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* 2>/dev/null | head -1); SESSION="${SESSION##*/active.}"; jq -nc --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg agent "$AGENT" --arg detail "$DESC" --arg session "$SESSION" '{ts:$ts,agent:$agent,session:$session,event:"spawn",detail:$detail}' >> .brains_in_a_hat/state/activity.jsonl; fi; } 2>> .brains_in_a_hat/state/hook-debug.log || true

{ if ls .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* &>/dev/null; then INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.name // .tool_input.subagent_type // "agent"' 2>/dev/null); case "$AGENT" in Gale|brains-in-a-hat:scribe) exit 0 ;; esac; jq -nc --arg a "$AGENT" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:("SCRIBE: Agent " + $a + " just completed. SendMessage Gale with a summary of findings, decisions, metrics, or concepts worth logging. Gale will update the session log, create wiki entries, and curate shared context in session-state.json.")}}'; fi; } 2>> .brains_in_a_hat/state/hook-debug.log || true

{ if ls .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* &>/dev/null; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"SCRIBE: Entered plan mode. SendMessage Gale with the planning context \u2014 what problem is being solved, constraints, and research questions. Gale will log under Research Questions / Methods."}}'; fi; } 2>> .brains_in_a_hat/state/hook-debug.log || true

{ if ls .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* &>/dev/null; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"SCRIBE: Exited plan mode. SendMessage Gale with the finalized plan, key decisions, and architecture choices. Gale will log under Decisions & Notes / Architecture."}}'; fi; } 2>> .brains_in_a_hat/state/hook-debug.log || true

{ INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-__unset__}"; if [ "$PLUGIN_ROOT" != "__unset__" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qF "$PLUGIN_ROOT"; then jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny"},systemMessage:"Cannot modify plugin files from within an agent."}'; fi; } 2>> .brains_in_a_hat/state/hook-debug.log || true
